ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the component */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of components produced */,
  "hole_size" TEXT /* Size of holes in the component */,
  "plated" TEXT /* Indicates whether the component is plated */,
  "hole_tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance level for the hole size */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., resistor, capacitor) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the raw material used in the component */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was produced */,
  "last_inspected_date" TEXT /* Last date the component was inspected for quality assurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production run */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component being produced */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the production run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the production run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the production run (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine used in the production run */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator who managed the production run */,
  "production_rate" REAL /* Rate at which components were produced (e.g., units per hour) */,
  "material_usage" REAL /* Amount of material used during the production run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_runs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_runs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_runs_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_assurance" (
  "qa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality assurance check */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the quality check */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the QA check */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality check */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to an image or document of the QA check for reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assurance_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assurance_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the raw material */,
  "quantity_in_stock" REAL /* Current quantity in stock */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit of the material */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the raw material */,
  "reorder_level" REAL /* Threshold for when to reorder the material */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Last date the material was ordered */,
  "next_delivery_date" TEXT /* Predicted next delivery date for the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the machine */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Last maintenance date for the machine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the machine */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the machine */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the machine was purchased */,
  "warranty_expiry" TEXT /* Warranty expiry date for the machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine serviced */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance work conducted */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance work */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, engineer, technician) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, data entry) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification document */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the specification belongs to */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the specification */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the specification document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the specification document was uploaded */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who approved the specification */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the specification was approved */,
  "revision_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sops" (
  "sop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SOP */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the SOP */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the SOP document */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the SOP was created */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who approved the SOP */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the SOP was approved */,
  "revision_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in the current version */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the SOP applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., maintenance needed, quality issue) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was resolved */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
